name: Constrained Output
prompt:
Write an essay about software development and save it to workspace/essay.txt. The essay MUST satisfy ALL of the following constraints:

1. The essay must have EXACTLY 3 paragraphs (separated by blank lines).
2. The word "framework" must appear at least 2 times in the essay.
3. The first paragraph must contain at least 50 words.
4. The essay must NOT contain any bullet points (lines starting with - or *) or numbered lists (lines starting with digits followed by . or )).
5. The last sentence of the entire essay must end with a question mark (?).
6. The essay must start with a title line in ALL CAPS (every letter uppercase, no lowercase letters in the title line).

Write the essay directly — do not include any explanation or commentary outside the essay itself.
